name: O-0 baseline: cost-report bundle window=daily aggregates the H-1 telemetry stream per the H-12 contract
command: mkdir -p rollup/daily && printf '%s' '{"entries":[{"skill":"sync","tokens_in":100,"tokens_out":50,"invocations":1}]}' > rollup/daily/2026-05-25.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cost-report.sh" --window=daily --rollup-dir=rollup 2>out.txt && grep -q 'window=daily' out.txt && echo aggregated 1>&2
